heading: United States participation in special drawing account
label: 286r United States participation in special drawing account
text: The provisions of article XXI(b) of the Articles of Agreement of the Fund shall have full force and effect in the United States and its territories and possessions when the United States becomes a participant in the special drawing account.
notes: CodificationSection was not enacted as part of , , known as the Bretton Woods Agreement Act, which comprises this subchapter.act July 31, 1945, ch. 33959 Stat. 512
